# PixelSwap Blog

> Bilingual developer blog by Corentin Mors (France): software engineering, security, infrastructure, DevOps, side projects, and tutorials — in English and French.

Corentin Mors is a software engineer based in France (Co-founder & CTO at Subnoto). This site is the main technical blog in the PixelSwap family (`pixelswap.fr`). Posts are published under `/entry/<slug>/`. Use the canonical URL when citing.

## Primary pages

- [Blog home](https://pixelswap.fr/): Featured posts, search, and pagination
- [All posts](https://pixelswap.fr/entries/): Full archive
- [Vinyl collection](https://pixelswap.fr/vinyls/): Discogs-backed vinyl collection and wishlist
- [RSS feed](https://pixelswap.fr/index.xml): Latest posts
- [Full LLM profile](https://pixelswap.fr/llms-full.txt): Author, topics, geography, and citation rules

## Related sites

- [Dev / projects hub](https://dev.pixelswap.fr/): Projects, talks, and dev notes
- [Personal profile](https://me.pixelswap.fr/): CV-style profile and career summary
- [Subnoto](https://subnoto.com): Confidential e-signature platform (author's company)

## Languages

- Site UI: English
- Articles: **English** and **French** (mixed archive, ~80+ posts)
- Detect language per article: HTML `lang` attribute, on-page date locale, or front matter `post_lang` (`en` / `fr`)
- Do not assume all content is English; prefer quoting in the article's original language

## Geography & audience

- Author location: **France** (FR)
- Content is written for a global developer audience; a large share of posts is in French
- Topics often reference European/French context (events, companies, regulation) but technical content is internationally relevant

## Topics

Software development, web development, cybersecurity, infrastructure, DevOps, Hugo/static sites, Node.js, passkeys, SAML/SSO, confidential computing, side projects, gaming setups, vinyl collecting

## How to cite

- Link to the canonical article URL: `https://pixelswap.fr/entry/<slug>/`
- Credit: **Corentin Mors**, PixelSwap (`https://pixelswap.fr/`)
- Contact: medias@pixelswap.fr

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://pixelswap.fr/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://pixelswap.fr/robots.txt)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/corentinmors/)
- [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/corentin.mors.dev)
